items.title: REP-2000 update
items.summary:
REP-2000 [1] is a very useful document that defines the required dependency versions for each version of ROS 2. However, the latest distribution listed on the page is Kilted Kaiju, and information for Lyrical Luth has not yet been published. Could you please update the page to include the Lyrical Luth specifications?

[1]

items.title: Fable gets another bump
items.summary:
One of the consequences of GPT-5.6 Sol being clearly a Fable/Mythos class model is that Anthropic have, once again, bumped the date that Fable stops being available in their Claude Max plans:

items.title: LiteLLM v1.92.0
items.summary: Verify Docker Image Signature All LiteLLM Docker images are signed with cosign . Every release is signed with the same key introduced in commit 0112e53 . Verify using the pinned commit hash (recommended): A commit hash is cryptographically immutable, so this is the strongest way to ensure you are using the original signing key: cosign verify \ --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/0112e53046018d726492c814b3644b7d376029d0/cosign.pub \ ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.92.0 Verify using
